command.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000) select @message = '' &DetailTaxGridScattering; select @message as message return

grid.response:
&EnvironmentTaxGetUOMConversion;
declare @rate numeric(16, 5) if exists(select 1 from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*')) begin select @rate = he_so from dmqddvt where dvt = @dvt and (ma_vt = @ma_vt or ma_vt = '*') select isnull(@rate, 1) as he_so&EnvironmentTaxUOMReturn; return end
if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end exec FastBusiness$Voucher$SalesReturn$Item @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho, @tk_dt, @tk_gv, @tk_cpbh, @voucherCode, @@userID, @@admin, @tk_ck, &DetailTaxFlag;&EnvironmentTaxParameter; return end
declare @unitCode varchar(32) select @unitCode = case when @$ma_dvcs = '' then @@unit else @$ma_dvcs end if exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_dvcs = @unitCode)&SiteCheck; begin exec FastBusiness$Voucher$Issue$Site @unitCode, @ma_vt, @ma_kho return end
if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @promotionAccount varchar(32), @promotionAccountType varchar(1), @salesAccount varchar(32), @salesAccountType varchar(1), @costAccount varchar(32), @costAccountType varchar(1), @taxCode varchar(32) select @promotionAccount = rtrim(tk_cpbh), @salesAccount = rtrim(tk_tl), @salesAccountType = 1, @costAccount = rtrim(tk_gv), @costAccountType = 1, @taxCode = ma_thue from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt if isnull(@salesAccount, '') <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmtk where loai_tk = 1 and tk = @salesAccount) select @salesAccountType = 0 if isnull(@costAccount, '') <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmtk where loai_tk = 1 and tk = @costAccount) select @costAccountType = 0 if isnull(@promotionAccount, '') <> '' and not exists(select 1 from dmtk where loai_tk = 1 and tk = @promotionAccount) select @promotionAccountType = 0 select @promotionAccount as tk_cpbh, @promotionAccountType as kieu_cpbh, @salesAccount as tk_dt, @salesAccountType as kieu_dt, @costAccount as tk_gv, @costAccountType as kieu_gv, @taxCode as ma_thue return end
if exists(select 1 from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt) begin declare @account varchar(33), @type bit select @type = 1, @account = @tk_ck if @tk_ck = '' select @account = tk_ck from dmvt where ma_vt = @ma_vt if not exists(select 1 from dmtk where loai_tk = 1 and tk = @account) select @type = 0 select rtrim(@account) as tk_ck, @type as kieu_ck return end
&DetailTaxGetTaxRate; &DetailTaxGetTaxAccount;

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt&GridDetailQueryLoadingJoin; where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
